docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,576.74 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, ELENA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-13-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-13-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-13-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.'S REPRESENTATIVE PRISCILLA TOVAR. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ELENA JACKSON. JUDGE PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE TEMPORARY JUDGE FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. JACKSON, ELENA
ORDER CONTINUED TO SEPT. 13, 2018 AT 1:30 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-13-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-13-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACKSON, ELENA $1,422.24 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,527.24, THE COURT DISALLOWS LATE FEES ASSESSED AFTER THE DATE OF DEFAULT, 2/10/18, BECAUSE THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECAME DUE AT THAT TIME, AND SUBTRACTS THE 6/14/18 PAYMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
